general_rules.condition: Enemy wave is 3+ minions larger than yours and near your turret.
general_rules.goal: Force the enemy to walk up into a gank risk and deny them gold/XP.

general_rules.condition: You have a slight minion advantage or a new wave just arrived.
general_rules.goal: Build a massive hoard. This makes you 'undiveable' and lets you recall safely after it crashes.

general_rules.condition: You need to recall or rotate to an objective (Grubs/Herald).
general_rules.goal: Kill the minions as fast as possible to crash the wave and minimize lost XP while you are gone.
Hard shove the cannon wave, recall immediately for a Long Sword/Cull, and walk back without losing a single minion.

yorick_special_rules.condition: Early game, less than 3 graves available.
yorick_special_rules.goal: GENERAL RULE OVERRIDE: Do NOT push. Last hit only until you have a 'Hoard' ready to summon.
GENERAL RULE OVERRIDE: You cannot freeze. Focus on 'Perma-Push' and taking Jungle camps between waves.
